sweep_defs_read.reason: phase-2 source not read this iteration: fixes were prose/comment/doc corrections and one test-fixture row; recorded rather than fabricated

phase3_findings.description: docs/review-and-fix-budget.md BEFORE always-loaded token cell read 50,271 (= 47,061 + the stale 3,210 extension value) where the doc's own round(words*1.3) formula gives 50,276; falsified the diff-added no-carried-forward note.
fixing.md item 6's 'no third Write is ever needed' made false by this PR adding reference_reads.fix_delta, which Step 3.5 writes after item 6's re-Write.
lib/test/run.sh matrix comment cited a 'missing-status' row; no such row exists (sixth fixture is wrong-status {"fix_delta":{"status":"verified"}}).
No matrix row for reference_reads: {} — the 'Step 3.5 never ran' shape appearing illegitimately on a synthesized record.
do_self_check evidence-shape else backstop arm has no test; reachable via a DEVFLOW_JQ stub exiting non-zero.
evidence_bad captures jq with 2>&1 and word-splits the result into field names; jq stderr on the success path would fabricate a bogus per-token warning.
The reason non-empty check ((.reason // "") | tostring | length) == 0 accepts any non-string scalar (reason: 0 or an object passes).
docs/DEVFLOW_SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.md §16 synthesis-floor enumeration is now incomplete (missing the three new fields).

fix_decisions.claim_text: the do_self_check else backstop arm has no test
fix_decisions.evidence: Real but warn-only test gap; driving it needs a DEVFLOW_JQ non-zero stub. Not trivially-and-clearly-correct per Step 3 item 2's Suggestion triage; deferred rather than rushed into a warn-only path late in the loop.

fix_decisions.claim_text: evidence_bad 2>&1 stderr can be word-split into fabricated field names
fix_decisions.evidence: Corroborated 2/5 and real, but latent (jq is silent on success over valid JSON) and warn-only. The 2>&1 is load-bearing for the else arm's breadcrumb, so splitting the capture risks regressing that arm; deferred over a rushed restructure.

fix_decisions.claim_text: the reason non-empty check accepts non-string scalars
fix_decisions.evidence: Trivial as a one-conjunct change but alters what the warn-only validator flags; grouped with F-5/F-6 as one efficiency-trace.sh follow-up rather than a late partial edit.

Already recorded as an explicit deferral in docs/cutovers/issue-541-reference-reads-evidence-schema.md with its mechanical cause (#434 R3b count-lock); the changeset scopes its reconciliation claim to defining surfaces and names the overview as narrative.

lib/test/test_module_harness.py is not among this PR's changed files (git diff origin/main...HEAD --name-only: 0 matches). Pre-existing load-dependent flake; OK on 6 of 8 local runs under concurrent-agent load.

verification_evidence.note: 10857 passed, 1 failed on the post-commit run; the single failure is the pre-existing out-of-scope intermittent timeout recorded as F-9 (lib/test/test_module_harness.py, untouched by this PR). The pre-commit run was 10857 passed / 0 failed / 1 skipped, where the skip was the #434 blocking-gate self-scan skipping on a dirty tree; post-commit that gate ran and passed.

stale_prose_check.note: Post-fix HEAD recomputed against origin/main...HEAD; zero STALE, no fix-introduced counted-prose staleness.

phase3_findings.description: reference_reads.fix_delta's stated prohibition ('a not_verified fix_delta prohibits a clean APPROVE-family verdict') has no reader at Loop Exit. loop-exit.md contains zero mentions of reference_reads/fix_delta, while every sibling completeness gate in that file carries an explicit read-the-persisted-field-and-fail-closed instruction. fix-delta-gate.md's own failure arms instruct the executor to record the breadcrumb and PROCEED, so a run whose gate hit either arm emits a clean APPROVE with the prohibition never consulted. Fails OPEN.
Evidence-provenance shape check is scoped to synthesized records only; a real record with malformed reference_reads.fix_delta is shape-checked by nothing.
The #541 pin-block header 'ONE behavioral-fix pin, plus two presence pins' is a self-referential same-file count - the ordinal-rot class CLAUDE.md flags as non-demotable REJECT on a later edit.
do_self_check else backstop arm has zero coverage (re-raise of parked F-5).
Nothing asserts an ordinary (non-synthesized) record carrying a malformed reference_reads stays quiet; .synthesized scoping proven only by a well-formed fixture.
Malformed-shape matrix covers reference_reads only, not sweep_defs_read/sweep_evidence, though the stated rationale applies identically.
No fixture asserts a real non-synthesized record LACKING reference_reads produces no warning; conditionality inferred, not observed.

shadow.decide_outcome: 2 (new Important finding) - loop NOT converged; promotion not started (handed back to human)

evidence_comparisons.rationale: Same defect and same evidentiary basis as the iteration-1 parking (else backstop untested; DEVFLOW_JQ stub is the driver). No new failing input.
evidence_comparisons.note: Condition (b) fails: the re-raise is graded Important where the parking-time record graded it Suggestion, so parking cannot be preserved. Recorded as a park-calibration mis-grade (the loop under-graded its own finding).
